reason: All 6 test steps executed successfully with expected results. Agent responded correctly to the math question with the answer containing "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — page loaded successfully showing Gamut app with sidebar displaying available agents.
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260724-021030-oehl" in the sidebar — successfully navigated to the agent page with correct agent name displayed.
Verified agent status is "idle" — requirement satisfied (status shows "idle" which meets the requirement of "running" or "idle").
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and sent it — message successfully submitted to the agent, status changed to "working" indicating processing began.
Waited for agent response — response received in 2 seconds. Agent completed processing and returned to "idle" status.
Verified response mentions "4" — screenshot confirms the response displays "2+2 = 4" in the conversation, clearly showing the correct mathematical answer.
